languages.text: "Ты слышишь "штрафной", я — "искупительный"! Вы поддались нижайшим порывам и запятнали свои души, и все же вам дозволено не гнить в цепях, а сжечь грехи в пылу битвы. Так не позорь дар искупления Ему жалким стыдом!"

traits.locale_text: "Ты слышишь "штрафной", я — "искупительный"! Вы поддались нижайшим порывам и запятнали свои души, и все же вам дозволено не гнить в цепях, а сжечь грехи в пылу битвы. Так не позорь дар искупления Ему жалким стыдом!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"
languages.original_text: "Ты слышишь "штрафной", я — "искупительный"! Вы поддались нижайшим порывам и запятнали свои души, и все же вам дозволено не гнить в цепях, а сжечь грехи в пылу битвы. Так не позорь дар искупления Ему жалким стыдом!"

traits.locale_text: "You call it a 'penal' sentence. I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your sins in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

"You call it a 'penal' sentence. I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your sins in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

"You call it 'penal'. I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your sins in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

"You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

languages.text: «¡Lo que llaman "penal", yo lo llamo redentor! Sucumbieron a sus impulsos más bajos y mancharon sus almas, pero se les permite quemar sus transgresiones en combate en vez de languidecer encadenados. ¡No deshonren Su regalo de expiación avergonzándose de él!».
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Lo que llaman "penal", yo lo llamo redentor! Sucumbieron a sus impulsos más bajos y mancharon sus almas, pero se les permite quemar sus transgresiones en combate en vez de languidecer encadenados. ¡No deshonren Su regalo de expiación avergonzándose de él!».

languages.text: “你说这是‘受罚’，但在我看来，这是‘赎罪’！你们屈从于那些卑劣的冲动，玷污了自身的灵魂，然而，你们获准不必拖着锁链腐朽，而是得以在战火中烧尽自身的罪孽。所以，不要用这该死的羞辱，来玷污祂赐予你们的赎罪恩赐！”
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: “你说这是‘受罚’，但在我看来，这是‘赎罪’！你们屈从于那些卑劣的冲动，玷污了自身的灵魂，然而，你们获准不必拖着锁链腐朽，而是得以在战火中烧尽自身的罪孽。所以，不要用这该死的羞辱，来玷污祂赐予你们的赎罪恩赐！”

languages.text: « "Pénale", vous dites ? Le terme de "rédemptrice" me semble plus approprié ! Vous avez cédé à vos plus bas instincts et souillé vos âmes, et pourtant, au lieu de moisir enchaînés, on vous donne l'opportunité de purifier vos transgressions par le feu de la bataille. Ne déshonorez pas le don de l'expiation qu'Il vous a conféré avec votre honte pitoyable ! »
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: « "Pénale", vous dites ? Le terme de "rédemptrice" me semble plus approprié ! Vous avez cédé à vos plus bas instincts et souillé vos âmes, et pourtant, au lieu de moisir enchaînés, on vous donne l'opportunité de purifier vos transgressions par le feu de la bataille. Ne déshonorez pas le don de l'expiation qu'Il vous a conféré avec votre honte pitoyable ! »

languages.text: "Sen buna 'cezanın infazı' diyorsun. Ben buna 'kurtuluş' diyorum! En aşağılık dürtülere teslim oldunuz ve ruhlarınızı lekelediniz. Gelgelelim zincirler içinde çürümek yerine suçlarınızı savaşın sıcağında yakmanıza izin veriliyor. O hâlde O'nun kefaret armağanını sefil utancınızla lekelemeyin!"
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: "Sen buna 'cezanın infazı' diyorsun. Ben buna 'kurtuluş' diyorum! En aşağılık dürtülere teslim oldunuz ve ruhlarınızı lekelediniz. Gelgelelim zincirler içinde çürümek yerine suçlarınızı savaşın sıcağında yakmanıza izin veriliyor. O hâlde O'nun kefaret armağanını sefil utancınızla lekelemeyin!"

languages.text: "Ihr nennt es 'Strafe'. Ich nenne es 'Erlösung'! Ihr seid Euren niedersten Impulsen gefolgt und habt Eure Seelen befleckt, und doch ist Euch gestattet, nicht in Ketten zu verrotten, sondern Eure Verfehlungen in der Hitze der Schlacht auszubrennen. Also entehrt Seine Gabe der Sühne nicht mit erbärmlicher Scham."
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr nennt es 'Strafe'. Ich nenne es 'Erlösung'! Ihr seid Euren niedersten Impulsen gefolgt und habt Eure Seelen befleckt, und doch ist Euch gestattet, nicht in Ketten zu verrotten, sondern Eure Verfehlungen in der Hitze der Schlacht auszubrennen. Also entehrt Seine Gabe der Sühne nicht mit erbärmlicher Scham."

languages.text: 「罰だと言うのか。私は救済だと呼ぶ！卑劣な衝動に屈し、魂を汚したお前たちだが、鎖に縛られて腐るのではなく、戦いの熱の中で罪を焼き尽くすことを許された。だから、彼の贖罪の贈り物を、恥ずべき恥辱で汚すな！」
languages.original_text: "You call it 'penal.' I call it 'redemptive'! You surrendered to the basest impulses and stained your souls, yet you are permitted not to rot in chains but to burn away your transgressions in the heat of battle. So do not dishonour His gift of atonement with wretched shame!"

traits.locale_text: 「罰だと言うのか。私は救済だと呼ぶ！卑劣な衝動に屈し、魂を汚したお前たちだが、鎖に縛られて腐るのではなく、戦いの熱の中で罪を焼き尽くすことを許された。だから、彼の贖罪の贈り物を、恥ずべき恥辱で汚すな！」
